assets.notes: Casual at-home UGC with natural lighting, clear skin texture, and clean reserved space for the overlay comments.

cta.text: BUY ONE, GET ONE FREE TODAY!

promptVars.product: a supplement bottle with a bright pink label that reads HAIR, SKIN AND NAILS GUMMY, white cap, brand name covered by a black rectangle
promptVars.subject: a 50-60 year old blonde woman smiling
promptVars.scene: indoors at home, neutral background, casual smartphone photo
promptVars.extra: She is holding the bottle close to the camera and lightly pointing at it with a finger. Label faces the camera. Keep her face centered and fully visible. Keep the bottle and label in the lower-left or lower-middle-left area, above the banner and clear of the open space on the right side. Keep the pointing hand near the bottle on the left side. Leave the top-left and right-side overlay areas visually simple and empty, but do not draw any placeholder shapes or masks. Realistic skin texture.
avoid: subject or product cropped/occluded by overlay area
product or hands overlapping right-side overlay area
label hidden behind right-side overlay area

comments.text: Is this just a collagen supplement? @tracym
absolutely not! this is actually a clinically proven menopause hair thickening formula for women 55+... been a game changer for me
